Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute near 63rd Street Beach
ShortDescription: #63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding. Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #6 Jackson Park Express Temporary Reroute near Randolph/Stetson
ShortDescription: 6 Jackson Park Express buses are temporarily rerouted due to a street blockage near Randolph/Stetson.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#6 Jackson Park Express buses are temporarily rerouted due to a street blockage near Randolph/Stetson.

Northbound buses will operate via Michigan, Randolph, Columbus, Wacker and over normal route.

Southbound buses will operate via Wacker, State and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #82 Kimball/Homan Temporary Reroute at Homan/Lake
ShortDescription: 82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Homan/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Homan, Franklin, Kedzie, Madison, Homan, then over normal route, due to street blockage near Homan/Lake.

Allow extra travel time.
